subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto those who answered the Lord of Names when the Call was raised from the Prison of Akká [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم للذین اجابوا مولی الاسماء اذ ارتفع الندآء من سجن عکاء اذ
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @predictions and prophecies, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @knowledge; recognition of God
